recommendations.title: Elena Undone
recommendations.overview: The wife of a pastor who preaches against homosexuality embarks on an affair with a female writer.

recommendations.title: Saved!
recommendations.overview: Mary is a good Christian girl who goes to a good Christian high school where she has good Christian friends and a perfect Christian boyfriend. Her life seems perfect, until the day that she finds out that her boyfriend may be gay — and that she’s pre

recommendations.title: On My Skin
recommendations.overview: The incredible true story behind the most controversial Italian court cases in recent years. Stefano Cucchi was arrested for a minor crime and mysteriously found dead during his detention. In one week's time, a family is changed forever.

recommendations.title: Milk
recommendations.overview: The true story of Harvey Milk, the first openly gay man ever elected to public office. In San Francisco in the late 1970s, Harvey Milk becomes an activist for gay rights and inspires others to join him in his fight for equal rights that should be ava

recommendations.title: First Reformed
recommendations.overview: A pastor of a small church in upstate New York starts to spiral out of control after a soul-shaking encounter with an unstable environmental activist and his pregnant wife.

recommendations.title: King Richard
recommendations.overview: The story of how Richard Williams served as a coach to his daughters Venus and Serena, who will soon become two of the most legendary tennis players in history.

recommendations.title: Malcolm X
recommendations.overview: A tribute to the controversial black activist and leader of the struggle for black liberation. He hit bottom during his imprisonment in the '50s, he became a Black Muslim and then a leader in the Nation of Islam. His assassination in 1965 left a lega

recommendations.title: The Stanford Prison Experiment
recommendations.overview: In 1971, Stanford's Professor Philip Zimbardo conducts a controversial psychology experiment in which college students pretend to be either prisoners or guards, but the proceedings soon get out of hand. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: Two young boys, Valerio and Christian, form a powerful friendship over the summer.

recommendations.title: Boy Erased
recommendations.overview: Jared, the son of a Baptist pastor in a small American town, is outed to his parents at age 19. Jared is faced with an ultimatum: attend a gay conversion therapy program – or be permanently exiled and shunned by his family, friends, and faith.
